title: Light Block Mod
description: This mod adds blocks of light from 1.17 to early versions of minecraft
body:
Attention!
No updates are planned in the near future!

 Light Blocks from 1.17 - this mod adds light blocks from 1.17 to early versions of Minecraft. Similar blocks were also present in some versions of the Minecraft Pocket Edition (Bedrock Edition)!

 

Supported languages:
EN - English
RU - Русский 

Creative tab:

 

 

Fashion review on YouTube:

 

Official resource pack:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/light-block-from-java
